section.heading: Short title

content.p: This part may be cited as the “State and Local Transferability Act”.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–10, title V, § 5101, formerly title VI, § 6121, as added Pub. L. 107–110, title VI, § 601, Jan. 8, 2002, 115 Stat. 1876; renumbered title V, § 5101, and amended Pub. L. 114–95, title V, §§ 5001(a)(1), 5002(3), Dec. 10, 2015, 129 Stat. 2039, 2040.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 5101 of Pub. L. 89–10 was classified to section 7201 of this title prior to repeal by Pub. L. 114–95.
Another prior section 5101 of Pub. L. 89–10 was classified to section 7201 of this title, prior to the general amendment of former subchapter V of this chapter by Pub. L. 107–110.
Another prior section 5101 of Pub. L. 89–10 was classified to section 3171 of this title, prior to the general amendment of Pub. L. 89–10 by Pub. L. 103–382.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2015 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 114–95 effective Dec. 10, 2015, except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95, set out as a note under section 6301 of this title.
